description: Composition  Green polo T-shirt, made of 100% compact cotton, has a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, embroidered brand collection on the left chest and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergentWash dark colours separately  Do not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry inside out in shadeMedium heat steam iron do not iron on decorationsDon that sporty look in ease with this polo neck T-shirt from the  arrow  sport collection. Crafted from pure cotton and designed for style, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with  jeans  and  sports shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
